title: Many Bez_LS (BLS/Balbes)
description: all players (steve, alex, efe and more) become youtuber Bez_LS
body:
ENG:
What is your favorite BLS minecraft youtuber? 
If so, this resource pack replaces all minecraft characters(Sunny, Zuri, Makena, Steve, Alex, Kai, Efe, Ari and Noor) with BLS skins.

RUS:
Ваш любимый ютубер по майнкарфту BLS? 
Если да то этот ресурспак заменяет всех персонажей майнкрафт(Sunny, Zuri, Makena, Steve, Alex, Kai, Efe, Ari и Noor) на скины BLS.
![example BLS but only 9 ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/017f4a933a4296a6f21a8768a1f18f47384305a3.png)
